title: Yale 2 Lever Mortice Basic Security, Brass Finish, 3 Inch/76 mm
features: [ Mortice Lock ] Yale P-M246-PB-76 2 Lever Mortice Sashlock ideal for internal wooden doors with handles
[ Standard Security ] This lock provides a standard level of security and has a 2 year guarantee
[ Colour and dimensions ] Available in a Brass finish, the mortice lock has a 3 Inch/76mm backset
[ Keys Supplied ] Supplied with two standard Yale keys. Additional replacement keys can be ordered from a locksmith
[ Suggested Use ] Suitable for internal doors with door handles
description: From the manufacturer Security for all doors Mortice locks not only come in two different styles, but also in different security strengths. We recommend the 5 Lever British Standard approved mortice lock that ensures maximum protection for your main access points. Style & Colour The two types of mortice locks you may find are sashlock, that ensures keeping the door closed without locking it and deadlock, which only ensure locking. Also, choose from the two available finishes, Polish Brass or Polished Chrome, to fit the style of your home or with door accessories. Case Size & Measurements Case sizes are available in 64mm (2.5 inch) for a 45mm door backset and 76mm (3 inch) a 57mm backset to fit a variety of doors. In order to get the backset's dimension, measure the distance from the edge of the door to the centre of the key hole.
